caption: In a spacious indoor hall with a high, recessed ceiling and elegant chandeliers, several people engage in martial arts demonstrations on a blue mat. A man in a bright yellow traditional outfit is the central figure, performing dynamic movements and strikes. He is surrounded by others, including men dressed in blue uniforms who hold long wooden staffs. In the background, a crowd of spectators sits at tables, watching the performance. As the sequence progresses, the man in yellow moves across the mat with fluid, athletic motions, shifting his posture and extending his limbs. Simultaneously, the practitioners in blue adjust their positions, swinging and wielding their staffs in synchronized or reactive movements. The scene is brightly lit, highlighting the contrast between the yellow and blue attire against the neutral tones of the hall's architecture.
